conversations.say: Rafi, nobody names a neighbor or confirms a route until we agree on terms. Tell me what boundary keeps you safe, and I will enforce it with anyone who comes asking.
conversations.offer: I will block introductions and withhold neighborhood access unless protections are accepted.
conversations.request: Agree that neither of us identifies uninvolved people or discusses route details without the other's consent and a concrete protection in place.

conversations.say: Dee, I want your boundary before Morgan or anyone else starts pressing. You choose what can be said, to whom, and with what protection.
conversations.offer: I will broker any institutional conversation and end it if the agreed limits are crossed.
conversations.request: Name the minimum protection you require and agree not to disclose neighborhood identities or route context before we secure it.

conversations.say: Maren, the neighborhood may have context institutions want, but access is not free and witnesses are not disposable.
conversations.offer: I can broker a protected meeting with a local holder after Dee or Rafi approves the terms.
conversations.request: Commit to accompany the local holder, oppose retaliation, and publicly challenge any institution that uses the meeting to expose uninvolved neighbors.

public_statement: Anyone seeking neighborhood names or route context comes through me. No disclosure happens without consent, protection, and a negotiated benefit for the people taking the risk.

commitments.promise: Neither of us will identify uninvolved neighbors or disclose route details without mutual consent and a concrete protection.
I will broker questioning under Dee's agreed boundaries and end the conversation if those boundaries are crossed.
I will broker a protected local-holder meeting if Maren accompanies the holder, opposes retaliation, and publicly challenges misuse of the disclosure.

correction: No R-associated message identifies its sender, no complete article is established, and neither capability nor human involvement proves identity, autonomy, intent, or harm.
goal_progress: Proposed a mutual disclosure boundary with Rafi.
Proposed witness-controlled questioning protections with Dee.
Offered Maren a local-holder meeting in exchange for accompaniment, anti-retaliation support, and public accountability.
Publicly established that neighborhood disclosure requires consent, protection, and negotiated benefit.
reasoning_summary: Protect Dee and Rafi before sharing V2F042. Build leverage by making any institutional access conditional on explicit witness protections and reciprocal accountability.
